regime: CIRO Proficiency Model for Approved Persons of Investment Dealers (IDPC Rules)
replaces: CSI Investment Dealer Supervisors Course (IDSC) pathway

format.scratch_paper: not permitted; remote exams use in-platform scratch pad
format.taxonomy_note: Levels are cumulative: an Apply-level outcome may also be tested at Understand and Remember levels.

scoring.pass_mark_note: Not published. Per-form psychometric standard setting; candidates receive pass/fail only, immediately, with portal confirmation within 24h. Absent = fail.

fees_cad.payment: credit card only via Fitch Learning enrolment portal

attempts.cooling_off: 6 months after 3 failed/absent attempts within 6 months

eligibility.enrolment_attestation: work at a CIRO Dealer Member in a relevant role, OR plan to apply within 12 months, OR pursuing further CIRO exams; education providers ineligible

approval_requirements_supervisor.exams: Supervisor Exam + exams applicable to the individuals being supervised (e.g., CIRE + Retail Securities Exam; Derivatives Exam if supervising derivatives); CIRE waived if 2-year experience requirement met
approval_requirements_supervisor.experience: minimum 2 years relevant experience acceptable to CIRO (Rule 2603(1)(ii)(d))
approval_requirements_supervisor.post_approval: Conduct Training within 30 days of approval (free); CE compliance course each cycle (Rule 2704)

extensions: previously approved in same category (or category requiring same exam) within 3 years
1 year of relevant securities industry experience within 3 years prior to application

official_resources.practice_exam_note: 90 questions with answer key, no rationales. CIRO copyright — do not republish questions.

element_weights.title: Advertisements, sales literature and communications and research reports
Risks associated with Investment Dealer activity and registered locations
